title: Originate residential mortgage loan
situation: retail borrower applies for home purchase or refinance; LO must take application, run credit, collect docs, order appraisal, underwrite to GSE guidelines, satisfy conditions, and fund within RESPA timeline
motivation: close the loan within rate-lock period and RESPA/TRID disclosure deadlines
outcome: loan closed and funded; HMDA data collected; loan sold or retained
success_criteria: Loan Estimate delivered within 3 business days of application
closing disclosure delivered 3 business days before closing

title: Conduct annual credit facility review
situation: commercial credit facility requires annual review: financial statement spreading, covenant testing, risk rating update, and credit committee memo before maturity or annual renewal
motivation: detect credit deterioration early and maintain accurate risk ratings for capital adequacy
outcome: credit committee memo approved; risk rating updated; renewal executed or workout initiated
success_criteria: financial statements spread within 30 days of receipt

title: Process check fraud claim
situation: customer reports counterfeit or altered check; bank must freeze funds, conduct investigation under UCC Article 3, determine liability, and initiate recovery
motivation: recover funds and resolve liability under UCC within Reg E and UCC timeframes
outcome: fraud determined; funds recovered or loss taken; UCC claim filed if applicable
success_criteria: UCC claim filed if bank error

title: Onboard retail deposit customer
situation: individual opens checking or savings account; banker must verify identity under CIP, screen against OFAC/PEP lists, collect beneficial ownership if business, and activate account in core banking system
motivation: open account compliantly within session while preventing identity fraud
outcome: account opened; CIP documentation filed; online banking activated

title: Perfect and manage loan collateral
situation: commercial loan secured by real estate, equipment, or receivables requires UCC filing, deed of trust recording, lien search, and ongoing perfection monitoring
motivation: maintain first-priority lien position throughout loan term to protect collateral value
outcome: UCC filed; lien recorded; collateral file complete; monitoring schedule set
success_criteria: UCC-1 filed within 5 days of closing
deed of trust recorded within 10 days
insurance certificate on file and monitored

title: Process ACH return and exception
situation: ACH item returned by RDFI or originated item disputed; must be processed within NACHA timeframes, ODFI notified, customer debited or credited, and exception logged
motivation: resolve ACH exceptions within NACHA return windows to preserve settlement rights
outcome: return processed within NACHA deadline; customer account adjusted; exception documented
success_criteria: return processed within NACHA return window

title: Conduct BSA Customer Due Diligence review
situation: existing customer triggers periodic or event-driven CDD refresh: updated beneficial ownership, source of funds, transaction profile review, and risk rating update
motivation: maintain current CDD and detect changes in customer risk profile before examiner review
outcome: CDD refreshed; risk rating updated; EDD initiated if elevated; documentation filed
success_criteria: CDD review completed within policy timeframe

title: Process cross-border payment (SWIFT/SEPA)
situation: corporate customer initiates cross-border payment; specialist must OFAC screen beneficiary and intermediary banks, select correspondent route, generate SWIFT MT103/MX pacs.008, and reconcile nostro account
motivation: execute payment on value date while meeting OFAC screening and correspondent banking requirements
outcome: payment settled on value date; SWIFT confirmation received; nostro reconciled

title: Manage regulatory examination response
situation: OCC or Fed examiner requests documents, transaction samples, and policies for examination; bank must triage requests, gather materials, brief management, and submit response packages within examiner deadlines
motivation: demonstrate strong compliance culture and minimize examination findings
outcome: all examiner requests responded to on time; findings documented; MRA action plan submitted
success_criteria: initial document production within examiner deadline
MRA response plan approved by board

title: Issue and manage commercial letter of credit
situation: corporate customer requests LC for international trade; bank must review application, credit-approve, issue LC via SWIFT MT700, manage document presentation under UCP600, and effect payment
motivation: support customer trade without taking unauthorized credit risk; comply with UCP600
outcome: LC issued; documents examined; payment effected on compliant presentation
success_criteria: LC issued within 2 business days of credit approval
compliant presentation paid on due date

title: Manage interest rate risk (IRRBB)
situation: quarterly ALCO requires IRR report: NII sensitivity simulation, EVE shock analysis, and comparison to internal policy limits and regulatory guidance
motivation: ensure NII and EVE exposures are within board-approved risk appetite
outcome: ALCO report presented; limit breaches escalated; hedging action taken if required
success_criteria: NII sensitivity modeled for at least 6 rate scenarios

title: Handle deceased customer estate settlement
situation: customer dies leaving deposit accounts, safe deposit box, and/or loans; bank must verify death, identify legal representative, inventory assets, process estate transfers or payoffs, and close accounts per state escheatment rules
motivation: settle estate account efficiently while complying with state probate and escheatment requirements
outcome: estate settled; funds transferred to legal representative or escheated; accounts closed
success_criteria: funds transferred or escheated within state timeframe

title: Conduct fair lending self-assessment
situation: annual ECOA/FHA compliance review: disparate treatment analysis of loan decisions, pricing analysis by protected class, redlining screen for CRA assessment areas, and HMDA data integrity check
motivation: detect fair lending risk before examination and demonstrate proactive compliance
outcome: analysis completed; findings documented; corrective actions initiated; management report filed
success_criteria: disparate treatment analysis completed for all loan products
pricing analysis by protected class completed
redlining screen for all CRA assessment areas

title: Process SBA-guaranteed loan
situation: small business applies for SBA 7(a) or 504 loan; LO must submit application to SBA ETRAN, meet SBA eligibility rules, obtain SBA authorization, close under SBA SOP requirements, and disburse
motivation: provide guaranteed financing to small business while meeting SBA program requirements
outcome: SBA authorization issued; loan closed per SOP; funds disbursed; SBA loan number assigned

title: Manage dormant account and unclaimed property
situation: accounts with no owner-generated activity for state-mandated dormancy period must be escheated; coordinator must identify dormant accounts, send required notices, report to state, and remit funds
motivation: comply with state unclaimed property laws and avoid regulatory penalty
outcome: dormant accounts identified; notices sent; state report filed; funds remitted
success_criteria: dormant accounts identified per state dormancy period
state unclaimed property report filed on time
funds remitted to state by deadline

title: Process loan modification or forbearance
situation: distressed borrower requests loan modification, forbearance, or short sale approval; specialist must evaluate financial hardship, underwrite modification terms, obtain investor approval, execute modification agreement
motivation: prevent avoidable foreclosure while recovering maximum NPV for investor
outcome: modification approved and executed; trial period started; terms documented

title: Manage operational risk loss event
situation: material operational loss event triggers OR event logging, root cause analysis, loss quantification, regulatory notification if threshold exceeded, and corrective action tracking
motivation: capture OR losses accurately for regulatory capital modeling and prevent recurrence
outcome: OR event logged; root cause identified; regulatory notification filed if required; corrective action implemented
success_criteria: OR event logged within 3 days of discovery
root cause analysis completed within 30 days
regulatory notification filed if threshold exceeded

title: Conduct regulatory stress test (DFAST/CCAR)
situation: annual DFAST submission requires designing severely adverse macro scenarios, running credit loss models across loan portfolios, projecting NII and expenses, and submitting results to OCC/Fed
motivation: demonstrate capital adequacy under stressed conditions and meet regulatory submission deadline
outcome: DFAST results submitted on time; capital ratios under all scenarios above minimums
success_criteria: all scenarios modeled per regulatory guidance
credit loss models run for all portfolios
capital ratios calculated for all 9 quarters
submission completed on or before deadline

title: Issue and manage credit card account
situation: approved credit card applicant must receive a card, activate it, set initial credit limit, and be enrolled in rewards program; ongoing management includes limit increases and delinquency management
motivation: activate card-holder quickly to capture interchange revenue and deepen customer relationship
outcome: card issued and activated; credit limit set; rewards enrolled; first statement generated
success_criteria: card mailed within 5 business days of approval
activation enabled via phone or online
first statement generated on cycle date

title: Manage LIBOR-to-SOFR loan transition
situation: legacy floating-rate loans referencing LIBOR must be amended to SOFR-based fallback rates; operations must identify affected loans, prepare amendment letters, obtain customer consent, and update core system rate indices
motivation: complete IBOR transition before contractual fallback trigger while minimizing customer friction
outcome: all affected loans amended; customer consents obtained; system rate indices updated
success_criteria: amendment letters sent to all borrowers
core system indices updated before transition date
